rationale: The citing paper explicitly uses Simpson et al. (2021) as methodological precedent for its incentive-compatible donation design, noting that it follows a similar lottery-based procedure in the pilot and later studies. This is not just a background mention; the cited work is invoked to justify how donations are operationalized and why the design is behaviorally meaningful. The citation is therefore functionally important to study implementation, even though the citing paper does not build on Simpson et al.'s crowdfunding theory.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a procedure used in Simpson et al. (2021) to design incentive-compatible donation tasks (e.g., lottery-based donation bonuses) in its own WOM experiments. The cited paper is used as methodological support for realism and validity of donation-related measures.
